commands.name: bitshit
commands.description: Launch the interactive dashboard (TUI)

commands.name: run
commands.description: Pull & run a model. Downloads if not cached locally.

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Download and register a model into the local vault without running it.

commands.name: rm
commands.description: Remove a model from the local vault (physically deletes the .gguf file).

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all downloaded models in the local vault.

commands.name: model set-chat
commands.description: Switch the active chat/inference model dynamically without restart.

commands.name: model set-vector
commands.description: Switch the active vector/embedding model dynamically.

commands.name: ps
commands.description: Show active neural engines in memory and auto-heal stale PIDs.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show this help screen

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show hardware status and silicon health metrics.

commands.name: calibrate
commands.description: Re-scan hardware and synchronize SiliconTruth profile

commands.name: benchmark
commands.description: Run a full hardware performance benchmark. Optionally target a specific model.

commands.name: booster
commands.description: View or configure system performance booster settings. Run without flags for interactive TUI mode.

commands.name: permission firewall
commands.description: Change the WASM sandbox firewall status.

commands.name: permission telemetry
commands.description: Toggle engine telemetry stream on or off.

commands.name: permission kvcache
commands.description: Toggle KV Cache generation globally for inference sessions.

commands.name: test-jit
commands.description: Test JIT KV Cache compilation and memory footprint.

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Ingest a document natively for semantic chunking and RAG.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Setup bitshit Node Profile and Identity (Vectorization and DB Injection).

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start the background API Daemon (Server mode).

commands.name: config set
commands.description: Interactively configure any installed component's settings via guided dropdown menus. After each save, loops back to key selection automatically.

commands.name: config set (direct)
commands.description: Directly update a single component setting without interactive prompts. Preserves manifest YAML format and invalidates .bin cache automatically.
commands.example: bitshit config set extension bitshit-search settings.search_api_key "mykey"

commands.name: dev-sync
commands.description: Sync compiled development artifacts (engines, drivers) to ~/.bitshit manually. Useful for local dev iteration without reinstalling.

commands.name: skill install
commands.description: Install a skill from the bitshit-hub registry.

commands.name: skill list
commands.description: List all locally installed WASM skills.

commands.name: skill remove
commands.description: Remove an installed skill and its cached artifacts.

commands.name: skill cache ls
commands.description: List all active and orphaned dual-caches.

commands.name: skill cache clear
commands.description: Clear specific or all orphaned KV caches globally. Use -f to force-delete active caches.

commands.name: plugin
commands.description: Manage bitshit Plugins (Native muscles).

commands.name: plugin cache ls
commands.description: List all active plugin caches.

commands.name: plugin cache clear
commands.description: Clear specific or all plugin caches globally.

commands.name: extension
commands.description: Manage bitshit Extensions (Brain + Muscle bundles).

commands.name: extension cache ls
commands.description: List all active extension caches.

commands.name: extension cache clear
commands.description: Clear specific or all extension caches globally.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

commands.name: mcp cache ls
commands.description: List all active MCP caches.

commands.name: mcp cache clear
commands.description: Clear specific or all MCP caches globally.

commands.name: cel execute
commands.description: Natively executes a bitshit Execution Language (CEL) script.

commands.name: cel test
commands.description: Compiles and validates a CEL script without executing state-mutating actions.
